summary: Trustless V4 Iteration 127 - Security/Idempotency Hardening Tests: All 33 tests passed. Verified: (1) Atomic CAS on evaluate_appointment prevents race conditions with 'Déjà évalué' response, (2) Atomic CAS on _run_analysis blocks on disputed/resolved/analyzing phases, (3) Dead HTTP endpoints removed (POST /evaluate, POST /reevaluate, PUT /reclassify return 404), (4) GET endpoints still work, (5) Full 1v1 flows work correctly, (6) Monitoring code for stuck collecting phases exists, (7) Strong proof lockdown working.

trustless_v4_iter127_tests.test_1_atomic_cas_evaluate_appointment: PASS - 2nd call returns skipped=True, reason='Déjà évalué'
trustless_v4_iter127_tests.test_9_strong_proof_lockdown: PASS - GPS/QR/Video admissible, Meet/GPS-far not admissible
trustless_v4_iter127_tests.test_10_monitoring_stuck_collecting: PASS - Monitoring code exists in run_declarative_deadline_job

atomic_cas_evaluate_appointment.description: MongoDB update_one with condition {attendance_evaluated: {$ne: True}} ensures only ONE caller can enter evaluation logic. Returns 'Déjà évalué' on second call.

atomic_cas_run_analysis.description: MongoDB update_one with condition {declarative_phase: 'collecting'} ensures only collecting→analyzing transition is allowed. Blocks on disputed/resolved/analyzing.

dead_endpoints_removed.description: POST /evaluate, POST /reevaluate, PUT /reclassify removed. Only GET routes remain.

monitoring_stuck_collecting.description: run_declarative_deadline_job checks if all sheets submitted but phase still 'collecting' for >10 min, then auto-triggers _run_analysis.

initialize_declarative_phase_guard.description: Guard blocks re-entry when phase is already collecting/analyzing/disputed/resolved. Only None and 'not_needed' are safe entry points.

is_self_declaration_preservation.description: Original declaration map preserves is_self_declaration field when creating updated_declarations in submit_sheet()

strong_proof_lockdown.description: GPS/QR/Video/NLYT Proof >= 55 → auto-confirmation, no manual_review, no Presences phase. Google Meet and GPS outside radius → NOT admissible.

critical_code_review_comments: Atomic CAS on evaluate_appointment correctly implemented using MongoDB update_one with condition
Atomic CAS on _run_analysis correctly blocks on non-collecting phases
Dead HTTP endpoints successfully removed from attendance_routes.py
Monitoring for stuck collecting phases implemented in run_declarative_deadline_job
All security/idempotency hardening features working as expected

success_rate.backend: 100% (33 tests passed: 10 iter127 + 4 atomic_guards + 9 idempotency + 5 presences + 9 lockdown)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data and test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trustless V4 security/idempotency hardening verified. Key changes: (1) Atomic CAS on evaluate_appointment at lines 467-483 of attendance_service.py, (2) Atomic CAS on _run_analysis at lines 246-263 of declarative_service.py, (3) Monitoring for stuck collecting phases at lines 899-933 of declarative_service.py, (4) Dead endpoints removed from attendance_routes.py. All 33 tests pass. Test files: test_trustless_v4_iter127.py, test_atomic_guards.py, test_idempotency_guard.py, test_presences_flow.py, test_strong_proof_lockdown.py.
